heroSubtitle: Because we're bored. Supercharge your ideas with our creative engineering and playful design.
introDescription: For people who want things built fast, affordable, and fun.
aboutContent: We thrive on turning boredom into brilliant, affordable digital products. Everyday problems need fun, beautiful, and accessible solutions. We're not bound by traditional agency rules. If it sounds fun, we build it. From idea to launch in record time, without compromising on quality.
productsSubtitle: Things we built because we had a free weekend. Go ahead, give 'em a try.

liveProducts.name: Boredom Buster AI
liveProducts.description: An AI that literally finds things for you to do.

liveProducts.name: Focus Flow
liveProducts.description: A beautifully simple pomodoro timer with zero settings.

comingSoonSubtitle: We're brewing some magic. Here is a sneak peek.

upcomingProducts.name: Project X
upcomingProducts.description: A revolutionary way to manage tasks.

waitlistSubtitle: Be the first to know when we launch new stuff. No spam, ever.
contactSubtitle: Whether you have a project in mind or just want to chat, drop us a line.
